name: Test Regression Starter Pack
description: Reusable orchestration hints for reproducing failures, selecting focused tests, repairing regressions, and recording validation evidence.

graphs.label: Test Regression Workstream
graphs.description: Discovery and verification lens for failing tests, regressions, smoke checks, and validation gaps.

skills.description: Guides failure reproduction, focused regression coverage, validation commands, and residual-risk evidence.

rules.description: Includes tests, source under test, package/build metadata, and validation scripts while excluding generated output.
